pages.title: What To Do
pages.text: Goal: survive early fights, learn the writing flow, then build enough momentum for your first tribulation.$(br2)Core glyphs: $(l)心$() for temporary HP, $(l)命$() for fatal-hit protection, $(l)净$() to cleanse debuffs, $(l)忍$() to convert damage into ink wound.$(br2)$(l)明$() gives early hostile sensing.

pages.title: Stage Exit
pages.text: Write $(l)入$() to enter Ink Arena and farm momentum. Once the wood stave reaches full momentum, write $(l)劫$(), win the tribulation, then upgrade to Stone.$(br2)$(l)入$(), $(l)劫$(), and $(l)出$() are available at every tier.
